title: Letters O and U
text: o o o u u u up up up out out out you you you sun sun fun fun cup cup

tips.text: O is right ring finger UP

out out you you you sun sun fun fun cup cup

character_tips.anna: O and U. Now you can write "you" — say hello to someone!
character_tips.knopych: 🤖 O AND U! Even MORE buttons!
character_tips.klavochka: Sunshine letters, my sweet — O and U ☀️
